description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious backyard with a swimming pool and palm trees. The front of the house includes a driveway with a parked car and landscaped greenery, flanked by two large coniferous trees. The house has a flat roof and large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The backyard is designed for leisure, with a wooden deck adjacent to the pool and additional seating or lounging areas. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker driveway and pool deck. The overall layout is open and functional, with clear separation between living spaces and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a backyard featuring a swimming pool and palm trees. The exterior is light-colored with landscaped greenery and a wooden deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, parked car, main entrance, and two large coniferous trees flanking the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the flat roof, and the backyard pool area with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, wooden deck, and open backyard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the boundary wall, landscaped areas, and the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, flanked by landscaping and a paved driveway, minimal decorative elements
